## Legal content review request

**Locale:** [EN / SK]
**Page:** [privacy / cookies / terms]
**Content file:** `src/content/[locale]/legal.ts`

## What needs review

- [ ] Privacy notices are accurate for the actual deployment
- [ ] Third-party processors are correctly named (Umami Cloud EU, Cloudflare, webhook host)
- [ ] Retention periods are appropriate
- [ ] Legal basis citations are correct
- [ ] Governing law clause is correct (Slovak Republic)
- [ ] Consumer rights section is complete
- [ ] Cookie policy matches actual cookie usage (cookieless analytics)
- [ ] Terms of service accurately describe the website's purpose

## Sign-off

- [ ] Legal counsel has reviewed and approved this content
- [ ] Any changes have been applied to the content file
- [ ] `lastUpdated` date has been updated to the review date

**Date:** ______
